structured.description: A class `Shader` that loads and manages OpenGL shaders. The class provides methods for binding the shader program, uniform float/matrix4f values, and validating the program. The `loadShader()` method loads the vertex and fragment shaders from files, compiles and links them, and returns a new `Shader` instance. The `validateProgram()` method checks the linked program's status and logs any errors.

items.description: provides functionality for binding a program, uniform float and matrix operations, and loading shaders from files.
items.name: Shader

items.description: activates a predefined OpenGL program, specified by the `program` variable.
items.name: bind

items.description: retrieves the value of the `program` field of the object.

usage.code:
Shader shader = Shader.loadShader("shader"); //Loads a shader with the name "shader"
int program = shader.getProgram(); //Gets the program from the shader object and assigns it to the variable program
GL20.glUseProgram(program); //Uses the program as the current program

items.name: getProgram

items.description: is a method that sets floating-point uniform values for a given name and array length in a OpenGL context.

params.name: name
params.description: name of the uniform to be set, which is used as an index to determine the appropriate glUniform* function to call.

usage.description: In this example, the method uniformf is being used to set the value of a shader's uniform with name "uniform_name" to 3.4f, 2.5f, and 6.7f respectively. The first argument passed into the method is the name of the uniform, followed by as many arguments as necessary to match the type of the uniform (in this case, three floats).

items.name: uniformf

items.description: updates a uniform matrix with the specified name using the `glUniformMatrix4` method and passes the matrix data to it in a flipped buffer format.

params.name: mat
params.description:
4x4 uniform matrix to be stored as a GL_UNIFORM buffer.

* `name`: The name of the uniform location where the matrix will be stored.
* `mat`: A `Matrix4f` object representing a 4x4 homogeneous transformation matrix.
* `getLocation()`: A method that returns a `String` representing the location of the uniform in the current program.
* `glUniformMatrix4()`: A glslang API function used to set the value of a uniform matrix.

items.name: unifromMat4

items.description: is a part of Java code that retrieves the location of a uniform in a GPU program. Specifically, it invokes the `glGetUniformLocation` method from the GL20 class to obtain the location of the uniform with the given name in the program's shader.

params.name: name
params.description: name of the uniform location to retrieve in the OpenGL ES 2.0 program object passed as the `program` parameter, and it is used by the `GL20.glGetUniformLocation()` function to locate the corresponding uniform variable within the program.

returns.description: an integer representing the location of a uniform in a program.

items.name: getLoaction

items.description: loads a shader program from a file and validates it.

params.name: filename
params.description: path to a file containing the vertex and fragment shader code for loading into a shader program using the `loadShader()` function.

returns.description:
a newly created Shader object representing the combined vertex and fragment shaders.

* The `Shader` object is returned as the result of the function, representing a shader program that has been loaded from a file.
* The `Shader` object contains information about the shader program, including its name and the types of its vertex and fragment shaders.
* The `program` variable contains the ID of the created program, which is used to reference the shader program in subsequent API calls.

items.name: loadShader

items.description: creates a new shader program and attaches it to the main program, loading a shader source code into the shader and compiling it before attaching it to the program.

params.name: target
params.description: type of shader being created, with possible values of `GL_VERTEX_SHADER`, `GL_FRAGMENT_SHADER`, or `GL_GEOMETRY_SHADER`.

params.name: src
params.description: Shaders source code that is being loaded and compiled into a shader program.

params.name: program
params.description: 3D graphics program that the shader will be attached to.

items.name: loadShader

items.description: validates a program object in Open GL by checking its linking and validation statuses, and prints any error messages if there are any.

params.name: program
params.description: 3D graphics program to be validated and linked with the OpenGL API.

items.name: validateProgram

items.description: reads the contents of a specified file and returns the resulting string.

params.name: file
params.description: file from which the text is to be read.

returns.description: a string representation of the contents of the specified file.

items.name: getText
